listingType.title: Listing Type
listingType.description: Whether to scrape properties for sale or for rent.

locations.title: Locations
locations.description: List of location names or area codes to search in (e.g. 'Bangkok', 'Sukhumvit', 'Sathorn').

minPrice.title: Minimum Price (THB)
minPrice.description: Minimum price in Thai Baht. Leave empty for no minimum.

maxPrice.title: Maximum Price (THB)
maxPrice.description: Maximum price in Thai Baht. Leave empty for no maximum.

maxItems.title: Maximum Items
maxItems.description: Maximum number of listings to scrape. Set to 0 for unlimited.

enrichWithBtsDistance.title: Enrich with BTS/MRT Distance
enrichWithBtsDistance.description: Calculate the distance to the nearest BTS Skytrain and MRT station for each listing.

enrichWithGoogleMaps.title: Enrich with Google Maps Data
enrichWithGoogleMaps.description: Use Google Maps API to get enriched location data (walking times, nearby amenities). Requires a Google Maps API key.

googleMapsApiKey.title: Google Maps API Key
googleMapsApiKey.description: Required if 'Enrich with Google Maps Data' is enabled.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Apify proxy configuration for bypassing anti-scraping measures.
